overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing approach to the castle at night, entering through a stone archway into a gothic corridor. The camera moves steadily forward from the moonlit exterior through a tunnel and into a wooden-beamed hallway with large windows, passing a carved pumpkin near the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle exterior approach on rocky cliffside

events.description: location text 'The South Wing (Hogwarts South Exit)' appears at bottom of screen

agents.ego_description: approaching the castle entrance across rocky terrain with pine trees

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple spires and towers perched on cliff edge
tall central tower with illuminated clock face
arched stone entranceway with warm light emanating from within
tall evergreen trees flanking the approach path
steep rock face dropping off to misty valley below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide exterior shot of Hogwarts castle at night, perched atop a rocky cliff. The camera moves steadily forward through pine trees toward the illuminated South Wing entrance, with the clock tower prominent against the dark blue sky. Location text appears identifying the area as the Hogwarts South Exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone tunnel entry with arched vaulting

events.description: passing through the stone archway from exterior into enclosed tunnel
transition from moonlit exterior to warm lantern-lit interior becomes complete

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway into the castle tunnel

entered.detail: large gothic stone arch with carved details and ivy growing on sides
rough-hewn stone blocks with climbing ivy and moss
warm glowing lanterns suspended from ceiling chains

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow stone tunnel through the gothic archway, leaving the exterior behind. The space is enclosed with rough stone walls covered in ivy, illuminated by warm hanging lanterns. The camera continues forward through the vaulted tunnel toward a distant wooden doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic covered bridge corridor with tall windows

events.description: entering the wooden corridor section with large gothic windows on both sides
large carved Halloween pumpkin comes into view on left side of corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered bridge corridor passing gothic windows with castle views

entered.detail: tall arched windows with ornate tracery showing night sky and castle towers outside
polished wooden planks with light patterns from windows
high pitched ceiling with exposed wooden beams and rafters
large jack-o-lantern with carved face emitting warm light

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a long wooden corridor with high gothic windows on both sides revealing the night sky and distant castle towers. The floor is polished wood with shadows cast by the window tracery. The camera continues forward past a large glowing carved pumpkin sitting on the left side, moving deeper into the warmly lit hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a moonlit exterior landscape into the warm, enclosed depths of the castle. It begins with a wide view of Hogwarts perched atop a rocky cliff, gliding through pine trees toward the illuminated South Wing entrance under a dark blue sky. As the camera passes through the gothic archway, the open night air gives way to a narrow stone tunnel where ivy-covered walls are lit by the glow of hanging lanterns. The scene then opens into a long wooden corridor with high gothic windows that cast intricate shadows across a polished floor, before finally passing a large glowing carved pumpkin as the camera moves deeper into the warmly lit hallway.
